meta.endClient: Crafted Cabinets — Pura, 25 Surf Rd, Alexandra Headland (Rev A)
meta.notes:
STONE: Alpha Surfaces — Jewel AZ003P, 20mm Polish (Collection 01). Drawing also annotates 'Alpha Zero' / 'Pencil Edgework to seen edges'. Per Mar-26 Alpha catalog: Jewel polished 3220×1620×20mm, Customer Price (Northcoast wholesale) $537/slab, indicative $105/m². Slab area 5.2164 m².

NAME DISCREPANCY: Quote PDF 'For:' field is 'Crafted Cabinetry'. Drawing title is 'Crafted Cab - Pura - Alex Heads'. Corpus folder uses 'Crafted Cabinets'. Treating 'Crafted Cabinetry' (PDF) as authoritative customerName.

=== BUILD-SPEC FROM DRAWING + QUOTE ===

Two rooms, both 20mm:

ROOM 1: 20MM Kitchen — NCS line item $3,201.00
  L-shaped run (3 pieces) plus a separate island.
  Piece K1 — Vertical leg corner piece: 1700 × 600 × 20mm.
    Edges: LEFT 1700 = Wall (unfinished). TOP 600 = Wall. RIGHT 1700 split: top 600mm = butt JOIN to K2; bottom 1100mm = Seen Edge. BOTTOM 600 = Seen Edge.
    Includes 1× Cooktop cutout.
  Piece K2 — Horizontal arm: 2700 × 600 × 20mm.
    Edges: TOP 2700 = Wall. RIGHT 600 = 'Panel' (AMBIGUOUS — labelled Panel not Wall not Seen; treated as Seen for polish estimate, may overstate). BOTTOM 2700 = Seen Edge. LEFT 600 = butt JOIN to K1.
    Includes 1× Undermount Sink cutout.
  Piece K3 — Island: 1900 × 900 × 20mm.
    All four edges Seen Edge. No cutouts. Standalone.

ROOM 2: 20MM Ensuite — NCS line item $312.00
  Piece E1 — 1100 × 600 × 20mm.
    Edges: TOP 1100 = Wall. LEFT 600, RIGHT 600, BOTTOM 1100 = Seen Edge.
    Includes 1× Vessel Basin cutout (drawn as small circle — AMBIGUOUS whether full vessel cutout or tap hole; treated as standard cutout $65).

JOB-WIDE:
  4 pieces total (3 kitchen + 1 ensuite).
  3 cutouts (1 undermount sink, 1 cooktop, 1 vessel basin).
  1 butt join (K1↔K2). No angled mitres. No waterfall ends.
  Total area: K1 1.02 + K2 1.62 + K3 1.71 + E1 0.66 = 5.01 m².

=== V3-CONCEPT GAPS ===
  Multi-room single quote (kitchen + ensuite): NCS bundles into one quote total. V2 supports this natively.
  'Panel' edge label: V2 edge model has Wall / Seen / Mitred. Panel is AMBIGUOUS — needs Jay to confirm whether it should be modelled as Seen+polished or as Wall (unfinished against cabinet panel). Treated as Seen here (more inclusive).
  Vessel basin cutout — is V2's catalog of cutout types granular enough to distinguish vessel basin (tap hole only) from undermount basin (full cutout)? Possibly a future cutout-type extension; not surfaced as urgent.

=== AMBIGUOUS ITEMS (would not block V2 build, Jay can resolve in 30s) ===
  - K2 RIGHT 600mm 'Panel' edge: polished or not?
  - E1 vessel basin: standard cutout ($65) or undermount-equivalent ($300)?

=== ncsImpliedBreakdown DERIVATION (line by line) ===

Materials:
  4 pieces (1700×600, 2700×600, 1900×900, 1100×600) totalling 5.01 m².
  Slab 3220×1620 = 5.2164 m². 1700×600 cannot pack onto a single slab alongside 2700×600 + 1900×900 + 1100×600 (verified by manual layout — slab height 1620 with 600+900 already used leaves only 120mm in the third strip, insufficient for any remaining piece). Therefore 2 slabs needed.
  2 × $537 = $1,074.00.
  Provenance: 'Alpha Surfaces catalog Mar26 Collection 01: Jewel 20mm Polish $537/slab Customer Price; 2 slabs needed for 4-piece layout'.

Cutting (Beau rate $17.50/Lm for 20mm):
  K1 perimeter 4.6 + K2 6.6 + K3 5.6 + E1 3.4 = 20.2 Lm.
  20.2 × $17.50 = $353.50.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm cut $17.50/Lm; total piece perimeter'.

Polishing (Beau rate $45.00/Lm for 20mm):
  K1 seen 1.7 + K2 seen 3.3 (incl. AMBIGUOUS Panel edge) + K3 seen 5.6 + E1 seen 2.3 = 12.9 Lm.
  12.9 × $45.00 = $580.50.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm polish $45.00/Lm; seen-edge length only; K2 Panel edge included as conservative upper bound'.

Cutouts (Beau rate sheet):
  1× undermount sink $300 + 1× cooktop $65 + 1× vessel basin $65 (treated as standard) = $430.00, 3 items.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27: undermount sink $300, standard cutout $65 each (cooktop, vessel basin)'.

Installation:
  null. Beau rate sheet did not include an installation rate.
  Provenance: 'Not in Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — needs Jay'.

Templating:
  Distance Kunda Park HQ → 25 Surf Rd Alexandra Headland ≈ 9 km. $150 + $2.00 × 9 = $168.00. Required=true (no supply-only flag on drawing or quote).
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded TEMPLATING_RATE, distance approx via Google Maps'.

Delivery:
  9 km → Local zone. $50 + $2.50 × 9 = $72.50.
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded DELIVERY_ZONES (Local zone), distance approx via Google Maps'.

Sum of populated implied components:
  1074.00 + 353.50 + 580.50 + 430.00 + 168.00 + 72.50 = $2,678.50
  NCS Total Excl GST: $3,513.00
  Gap: $834.50 — this is the unmodelled installation component plus any NCS margin. Plausible given Beau rate sheet excludes install.
